questionHtml:
The graph shows the change in the membrane potential of an axon during an action potential.

State the approximate value of the membrane potential at X.
markschemeHtml: 0 mV; (accept answers in the range of – 10 mV to +10 mV) (Units required)

meta.title: State the approximate value of the membrane potential at X.
breadcrumbLabels: C2.2.10. Oscilloscope traces showing resting potentials and action potentials
